name: Polymarket
zh: 全球最大的预测市场,用真实资金交易事件结果与概率。
en: The world’s largest prediction market, where users trade real-money probabilities on event outcomes.

name: Predict Fun
zh: BNB Chain 原生预测市场,强调更轻量、更社区化的预测交易体验。
en: A BNB Chain-native prediction market focused on a lightweight, community-driven trading experience.

name: Kalshi
zh: 合规事件交易平台,主打把现实世界事件做成可交易合约。
en: A regulated event trading platform that turns real-world outcomes into tradable contracts.

name: OPINION
zh: 以观点交易为核心的预测型平台,偏向宏观与立场表达类市场。
en: A prediction-style platform centered on trading opinions, with a focus on macro and narrative-driven markets.

name: Limitless Exchange
zh: 主打无需许可创建和交易事件市场的去中心化预测平台。
en: A decentralized prediction platform focused on permissionless market creation and event trading.

name: Probable
zh: 部署在 BNB Chain 上的去中心化预测市场。
en: A decentralized prediction market built on BNB Chain.

name: Myriad
zh: 围绕多主题事件交易构建的预测市场平台。
en: A prediction market platform built around trading across a wide range of event categories.

name: Hyperliquid
zh: 主打极致性能与订单簿体验的链上永续合约交易平台。
en: An onchain perpetuals exchange focused on high performance and a native order book trading experience.

name: Aster
zh: 面向所有交易者的下一代永续合约 DEX,强调更专业的衍生品交易体验。
en: A next-generation perpetual DEX for all traders, built around a more professional derivatives trading experience.

name: Lighter
zh: 主打更轻、更快撮合体验的链上交易平台。
en: An onchain trading platform focused on a lighter, faster matching and execution experience.

name: StandX
zh: 以可赚收益的 DUSD 保证金为特色的永续合约交易平台。
en: A perpetuals trading platform distinguished by its yield-bearing DUSD margin model.

name: xStocks
zh: 面向交易所、DEX 和钱包的代币化股票基础设施,把美股和 ETF 带上链。
en: Tokenized equities infrastructure for exchanges, DEXs, and wallets, bringing stocks and ETFs onchain.

name: Ondo
zh: 主打把机构级美元收益资产带到链上的 RWA 平台。
en: A real-world asset platform focused on bringing institutional-grade dollar yield products onchain.

name: Usual
zh: 围绕稳定币体系构建的 RWA 收益与资产管理入口。
en: An RWA yield and asset management platform built around its stablecoin ecosystem.

name: Midas
zh: 主打链上投资产品标准化发行与接入的RWA/投资平台。
en: An investment platform focused on standardized issuance and access for onchain investment products.

name: Maple
zh: 面向链上信贷与机构借贷场景的资本市场平台。
en: A capital markets platform built for onchain credit and institutional lending.

name: AAVE
zh: 开源流动性协议,是 DeFi 借贷市场的核心基础设施之一。
en: An open-source liquidity protocol and one of the core infrastructure layers of DeFi lending.

name: Pendle
zh: 以收益拆分和收益率交易为核心的 DeFi 利率市场。
en: A DeFi rates market built around yield tokenization and yield trading.

name: Curve
zh: 以稳定币和同类资产低滑点兑换见长的经典 AMM 协议。
en: A leading AMM protocol known for low-slippage swaps between stablecoins and similar assets.

name: Spark
zh: 主打让稳定币生息的 DeFi 平台,聚焦稳定币收益入口。
en: A DeFi platform focused on putting stablecoins to work and providing accessible yield opportunities.

name: Lido
zh: 质押 ETH 并获得 stETH 的流动性质押协议。
en: A liquid staking protocol that lets users stake ETH while receiving stETH.

name: Morpho
zh: 主打更高借贷效率与更优利率匹配的借贷协议。
en: A lending protocol designed to improve borrowing efficiency and rate matching.

name: Ethena
zh: 面向互联网经济的数字美元协议,核心产品是 USDe 与 sUSDe。
en: A digital dollar protocol for the internet economy, centered on USDe and sUSDe.

name: Fluid
zh: 以统一流动性与更高资金效率为卖点的 DeFi 基础设施平台。
en: A DeFi infrastructure platform built around unified liquidity and higher capital efficiency.

name: vfat
zh: 集收益聚合、资产看板与 DeFi 工具于一体的多链收益管理平台。
en: A multi-chain yield management platform combining yield aggregation, portfolio dashboards, and DeFi tools.

name: Stargate
zh: 基于 LayerZero 的跨链流动性协议,可跨链转移多种主流资产。
en: A LayerZero-powered cross-chain liquidity protocol for moving major assets across chains.

name: Relay
zh: 面向链上经济的跨链基础设施,主打资产跨链转移与执行能力。
en: Cross-chain infrastructure for the onchain economy, focused on asset transfer and execution across networks.

name: Uniswap
zh: 最主流的链上交易入口之一,以 AMM 交易与多链代币兑换为核心。
en: One of the most widely used onchain trading venues, centered on AMM swaps and multi-chain token trading.

name: PancakeSwap
zh: BNB Chain 代表性 DEX,覆盖兑换、赚币等多类链上交易场景。
en: A flagship DEX on BNB Chain that spans swaps, earning products, and broader onchain trading use cases.

name: 1inch
zh: 以找到 DeFi 最优兑换价格为核心卖点的 DEX 聚合器。
en: A DEX aggregator best known for finding optimal swap routes and pricing across DeFi.

name: Velodrome
zh: Optimism 生态代表性 DEX,强调以流动性激励驱动的链上交易市场。
en: A flagship DEX in the Optimism ecosystem , built around incentive-driven onchain liquidity markets.

name: SushiSwap
zh: 多链 DEX 品牌,核心入口是链上代币兑换。
en: A multi-chain DEX brand centered on onchain token swapping.

name: LFJ
zh: 面向链上交易场景的 DEX 品牌,强调更完整的交易体验。
en: A DEX brand for onchain trading, positioned around a more com plete trading experience.

name: LlamaSwap
zh: DefiLlama 提供的聚合式换币入口,主打透明比价与路由。
en: A swap aggregator by DefiLlama focused on transparent pricing and route com parison.

name: Matcha
zh: 由 0x 支持的 DEX 聚合交易前端,强调简洁顺畅的兑换体验。
en: A 0x-powered DEX aggregation frontend focused on a sim ple and smooth trading experience.

name: Jumper
zh: 多链流动性聚合器,主打为跨链与兑换找到最佳路径。
en: A multi-chain liquidity aggregator designed to find the best routes for bridging and swapping.

name: Oku
zh: 覆盖 swap、bridge、borrow、lend 的一站式非托管 DeFi 聚合平台。
en: A one-stop non-custodial DeFi aggregation platform covering swap, bridge, borrow, and lend.

name: OpenOcean
zh: 主打最佳兑换回报的加密资产聚合交易平台。
en: A crypto trading aggregator focused on delivering the best possible swap returns.

name: KyberSwap
zh: 以聚合流动性和提升交易效率为核心的 DEX 平台。
en: A DEX platform built around liquidity aggregation and more efficient onchain trading.

name: Fly
zh: 面向链上交易场景的聚合式交易产品。
en: An aggregated trading product designed for onchain trading use cases.

name: OpenSea
zh: 支持 Token 交易与 NFT 市场的一体化平台。
en: An integrated marketplace supporting both token trading and NFTs.

name: Blur
zh: 面向专业交易者的 NFT Marketplace,突出高频与专业化交易体验。
en: An NFT marketplace for professional traders, built around speed and pro-grade trading workflows.

name: Element
zh: 多链 NFT 交易市场,覆盖更广泛的链上 NFT 资产。
en: A multi-chain NFT marketplace covering a broader range of onchain NFT assets.

name: Zora
zh: 以链上内容发布与创作者发行场景为核心的平台。
en: A platform centered on onchain content publishing and creator issuance.

name: Rarible
zh: 主打多链 NFT 发行与交易的平台。
en: A platform focused on multi-chain NFT issuance and trading.
